comment.body: И с уведомлениями проблем нет? Лично у меня при включённом Adguard не приходит запрос на отправку уведомлений от сайта. Как только выключаю, тут же всё в порядке. Только что проверил в Chrome. Как я могу помочь исправить это?

comment.body: Или сам **фильтр всплывающих окон** предполагает отключение push-уведомлений от сайта? Покопавшись, нашёл там подобные правила по типу `Disabling of push-notifications`.

issue.title: www.gadgetreview.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.gamsgo.com/details/cannva](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.gamsgo.com%2Fdetails%2Fcannva) ### Comment > [Bug] False Positive: Payment Gateway Redirect Blocked on GamsGo.com > Environment: > > OS: macOS > > Browser: Google Chrome > > AdGuard Status: Active (Default Filters) > > Description of Architecture Failure: > Attempting to process a subscription checkout on GamsGo results in a severe functional block. When AdGuard is active, the primary routing script attached to the checkout button on the product details page fails to execute. The frontend registers the click, but the redirect drops the user into an authentication loop or dead-ends the session without bridging to the payment processor. > > Steps to Reproduce: > > Navigate to gamsgo.com and authenticate a standard user session. > > Select any subscription tier (e.g., Canva 12-month Shared). > > Click the "JOIN NOW" button to initiate the payment bridge. > > Expected Behavior: > The DOM script executes a background authentication check and routes the active session to the final payment/checkout screen. > > Actual Behavior: > The routing script is intercepted and blocked. The button click dead-ends or forcibly loops the user back to the primary dashboard. > > Diagnostic Vector & Resolution: > Temporarily disabling AdGuard immediately resolves the localized failure. Reloading the page without AdGuard filtering allows the "JOIN NOW" button to successfully bridge to the payment gateway. > > This indicates a false positive in the current filter lists, which are aggressively stripping a necessary third-party routing or payment verification script required for GamsGo's frontend checkout architecture to function. Requesting a filter review to whitelist the necessary backend routing variables for gamsgo.com checkouts so core site functionality is restored. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/iy2in03cti0cgg88cw08ksk848ckgko8x8cbsayjuo.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jdgpg7aesxcswo848gk0wo0owks8ss01pbpuzsfgtu.png?nc=1)

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.gamsgo.com/details/cannva](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.gamsgo.com%2Fdetails%2Fcannva) ### Comment > [Bug] False Positive: Payment Gateway Redirect Blocked on GamsGo.com > Environment: > > OS: macOS > > Browser: Google Chrome > > AdGuard Status: Active (Default Filters) > > Description of Architecture Failure: > Attempting to process a subscription checkout on GamsGo results in a severe functional block. When AdGuard is active, the primary routing script attached to the checkout button on the product details page fails to execute. The frontend registers the click, but the redirect drops the user into an authentication loop or dead-ends the session without bridging to the payment processor. > > Steps to Reproduce: > > Navigate to gamsgo.com and authenticate a standard user session. > > Select any subscription tier (e.g., Canva 12-month Shared). > > Click the "JOIN NOW" button to initiate the payment bridge. > > Expected Behavior: > The DOM script executes a background authentication check and routes the active session to the final payment/checkout screen. > > Actual Behavior: > The routing script is intercepted and blocked. The button click dead-ends or forcibly loops the user back to the primary dashboard. > > Diagnostic Vector & Resolution: > Temporarily disabling AdGuard immediately resolves the localized failure. Reloading the page without AdGuard filtering allows the "JOIN NOW" button to successfully bridge to the payment gateway. > > This indicates a false positive in the current filter lists, which are aggressively stripping a necessary third-party routing or payment verification script required for GamsGo's frontend checkout architecture to function. Requesting a filter review to whitelist the necessary backend routing variables for gamsgo.com checkouts so core site functionality is restored. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/iy2in03cti0cgg88cw08ksk848ckgko8x8cbsayjuo.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jdgpg7aesxcswo848gk0wo0owks8ss01pbpuzsfgtu.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.19.0.2258 release Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
EasyList,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
AdGuard Base filter Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.19.0.2258+release&system_version=&browser=chrome&filters=101.11.2&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
